text.title: Metric Deviation Hypothesis Framework Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Metric Deviation Hypothesis Framework. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: enumerate-hypotheses
step.action: Generate ≥3 causal hypotheses spanning upstream / metric-itself / downstream.

step.name: attach-detector-and-probability
step.action: Per hypothesis: pick observable detector + assign probability.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
